<timestamp>Saturday, Jul 18, 2026, 10:51 PM (UTC+7)</timestamp>
<user_query>
này là gì tại sao không commit
</user_query>
Bạn đang thấy Source Control với 6 thay đổi chưa stage và ô message trống — mình kiểm tra nhanh trạng thái git để giải thích chính xác.

input.command: git status; git branch --show-current; git diff --stat; git diff --cached --stat
input.description: Check git status and staged state

content.text:
Không commit được vì **2 lý do UI**, không phải lỗi Git:

1. **Ô message đang trống** — phải gõ message rồi mới bấm Commit (hoặc Ctrl+Enter).
2. **Chưa stage file nào** — cả 6 file đang ở **Changes**, chưa có mục **Staged Changes**. Bấm `+` từng file (hoặc Stage All) trước khi commit.

### Còn lại cần lưu ý

- Bạn đang trên nhánh **`main`**. Theo rule team, nên commit trên `feat/...` hoặc `develop`, không đẩy thẳng lên `main`.
- Trong list có **ai-log / session `.jsonl`** — đây là log Cursor, thường **không nên commit**. Chỉ stage các file code thật:
  - `services/audit-svc/app/db/engine.py`
  - `services/los-svc/app/db/engine.py`
  - `services/orchestrator-svc/app/api/routes.py`

### Cách làm nhanh

1. Stage 3 file `engine.py` / `routes.py` (bỏ qua ai-logs).
2. Gõ message, ví dụ: `fix(services): ...`
3. Bấm **Commit**.

Nếu bạn muốn, mình có thể giúp soạn message và commit giúp — nói rõ muốn commit file nào.

<timestamp>Saturday, Jul 18, 2026, 10:55 PM (UTC+7)</timestamp>
<user_query>
recheck lại xem chứ tôi bám vào file đâu có change gì đâu
</user_query>
Đúng — lúc nãy `git diff` gần như trống với các file service. Mình kiểm tra kỹ lại từng file xem Git báo “modified” vì lý do gì.

input.command: git diff --ignore-cr-at-eol --stat; Write-Host "==== FULL DIFF (services) ===="; git diff -- services/audit-svc/app/db/engine.py services/los-svc/app/db/engine.py services/orchestrator-svc/app/api/routes.py; Write-Host "==== NUMSTAT ===="; git diff --numstat -- services/; Write-Host "==== CHECK ATTRIBUTES / EOL ===="; git diff --ignore-space-at-eol --stat -- services/; git ls-files --eol -- services/audit-svc/app/db/engine.py services/los-svc/app/db/engine.py services/orchestrator-svc/app/api/routes.py; Write-Host "==== HASH COMPARE ===="; foreach ($f in @("services/audit-svc/app/db/engine.py","services/los-svc/app/db/engine.py","services/orchestrator-svc/app/api/routes.py")) { $idx = (git show ":$f" | git hash-object --stdin); $work = (Get-FileHash $f -Algorithm SHA1).Hash.ToLower(); Write-Host "$f"; Write-Host "  index: $idx"; Write-Host "  work:  $(git hash-object $f)" }
input.description: Inspect why service files show modified

input.command:
Write-Host "==== FILE MODE ===="; git diff --summary -- services/; git update-index --refresh; git status --short -- services/; Write-Host "==== BYTE COMPARE ===="; foreach ($f in @("services/audit-svc/app/db/engine.py","services/los-svc/app/db/engine.py","services/orchestrator-svc/app/api/routes.py")) { $tmp = New-TemporaryFile; git show ":$f" | Set-Content -Path $tmp -NoNewline -Encoding Byte -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; # use git cat-file
  $blob = git rev-parse ":$f"
  git cat-file -p $blob | Out-File -Encoding utf8NoBOM -FilePath "$env:TEMP\git-idx-$($f.Replace('\','-').Replace('/','-'))" 
  Write-Host "`n--- $f ---"
  Write-Host "size work: $((Get-Item $f).Length)"
  $idxBytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes((Resolve-Path $f))
  # dump first/last bytes and check BOM
  $work = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes((Resolve-Path $f))
  $idxPath = "$env:TEMP\idx-$(Split-Path $f -Leaf)"
  git show ":$f" | Out-Null
  git cat-file blob $blob > $idxPath 2>$null
  # PowerShell redirection may mess binary - use python
}
python -c "
import subprocess, hashlib, os
files = [
  'services/audit-svc/app/db/engine.py',
  'services/los-svc/app/db/engine.py',
  'services/orchestrator-svc/app/api/routes.py',
]
for f in files:
    idx = subprocess.check_output(['git','show',f':{f}'])
    with open(f,'rb') as fh:
        work = fh.read()
    print(f'=== {f} ===')
    print(f'  index len={len(idx)} hash={hashlib.sha1(idx).hexdigest()[:12]}')
    print(f'  work  len={len(work)} hash={hashlib.sha1(work).hexdigest()[:12]}')
    print(f'  equal={idx==work}')
    if idx != work:
        # find first diff
        for i,(a,b) in enumerate(zip(idx, work)):
            if a!=b:
                print(f'  first byte diff at {i}: index={a!r} work={b!r}')
                print(f'  context index: {idx[max(0,i-20):i+20]!r}')
                print(f'  context work:  {work[max(0,i-20):i+20]!r}')
                break
        else:
            print(f'  length differs: idx={len(idx)} work={len(work)}')
            if len(work)>len(idx):
                print(f'  extra work bytes: {work[len(idx):len(idx)+40]!r}')
            else:
                print(f'  missing from work: {idx[len(work):len(work)+40]!r}')
        # count CR
        print(f'  CR in index={idx.count(b\"\\r\")} CR in work={work.count(b\"\\r\")}')
        print(f'  LF in index={idx.count(b\"\\n\")} LF in work={work.count(b\"\\n\")}')
"

python -c @"
import subprocess, hashlib
files = [
  'services/audit-svc/app/db/engine.py',
  'services/los-svc/app/db/engine.py',
  'services/orchestrator-svc/app/api/routes.py',
]
for f in files:
    idx = subprocess.check_output(['git', 'show', f':{f}'])
    with open(f, 'rb') as fh:
        work = fh.read()
    print('===', f, '===')
    print('  index len=%d' % len(idx))
    print('  work  len=%d' % len(work))
    print('  equal=%s' % (idx == work))
    print('  CR idx=%d work=%d' % (idx.count(b'\r'), work.count(b'\r')))
    print('  LF idx=%d work=%d' % (idx.count(b'\n'), work.count(b'\n')))
    if idx != work:
        n = min(len(idx), len(work))
        for i in range(n):
            if idx[i] != work[i]:
                print('  first byte diff at', i)
                print('  idx ctx:', repr(idx[max(0,i-30):i+30]))
                print('  work ctx:', repr(work[max(0,i-30):i+30]))
                break
        else:
            print('  length differs only')
            if len(work) > len(idx):
                print('  trailing work:', repr(work[len(idx):]))
            else:
                print('  trailing idx:', repr(idx[len(work):]))
"@
git config --get core.autocrlf; git config --get core.filemode; git diff --raw -- services/

Write-Host "==== INDEX vs HASH-OBJECT ===="; git ls-files -s -- services/audit-svc/app/db/engine.py services/los-svc/app/db/engine.py services/orchestrator-svc/app/api/routes.py; foreach ($f in @("services/audit-svc/app/db/engine.py","services/los-svc/app/db/engine.py","services/orchestrator-svc/app/api/routes.py")) { Write-Host "$f hash-object=$(git hash-object $f)" }; Write-Host "==== AFTER REFRESH WITH ADD ===="; git add --dry-run -- services/audit-svc/app/db/engine.py services/los-svc/app/db/engine.py services/orchestrator-svc/app/api/routes.py; Write-Host "==== STAT CACHE ===="; git update-index --refresh -q; git status --short -- services/ ai-logs/
input.description: Compare index SHA vs worktree hash

content.text: Nội dung file khớp 100% với index — Git chỉ “ảo dirty”. Đang thử refresh index để xác nhận.

input.command: git add -- services/audit-svc/app/db/engine.py services/los-svc/app/db/engine.py services/orchestrator-svc/app/api/routes.py; Write-Host "==== STAGED DIFF (should be empty) ===="; git diff --cached --stat -- services/; Write-Host "==== STATUS ===="; git status --short; Write-Host "==== RESET TO CLEAR PHANTOM ===="; git restore --staged -- services/audit-svc/app/db/engine.py services/los-svc/app/db/engine.py services/orchestrator-svc/app/api/routes.py; git status --short -- services/
input.description: Stage then unstage to clear phantom dirty

content.text:
Bạn đúng — **3 file service không có thay đổi nội dung gì cả.**

Mình so byte-by-byte: index và working tree **giống hệt** (`equal=True`, cùng độ dài, cùng số dòng). `git diff` cũng trống. Cursor hiện `M` vì **phantom dirty** trên Windows (`core.autocrlf=true` + cache stat của Git bị lệch), không phải vì bạn sửa code.

Đã refresh index — 3 file đó **đã biến mất** khỏi Changes:

- `services/audit-svc/app/db/engine.py`
- `services/los-svc/app/db/engine.py`
- `services/orchestrator-svc/app/api/routes.py`

Còn lại chỉ là **ai-logs** (log Cursor), không phải code:

- `ai-log.jsonl` (modified)
- vài file session `.jsonl` (untracked)

**Kết luận:** không có gì đáng commit trong phần service. Nếu Source Control vẫn hiện 3 file đó, bấm refresh hoặc đóng/mở lại panel — còn ai-logs thì nên bỏ qua, đừng commit.
